query_normalized: quantifying the complexity of knot diagrams via crossing number and braid index mathematics
rationale: This paper directly addresses the braid index component of the user's question about quantifying knot diagram complexity, measuring the same mathematical construct (braid index) on the same domain (knot diagrams) — satisfying acceptance criteria (a) and (b). Even though it doesn't explicitly mention crossing number, it provides canonical theoretical results about braid index relationships that would be expected in a literature review on knot complexity metrics.
